title: selaginella neocaledonica
intro: Selaginella neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonian spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and even lowering blood pressure. Selaginella neocaledonica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
